sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105673" key="trugodi/fhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῠγο-δίφησις</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, </foreign>(<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">διφάω</etym>) <sense id="n105673.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">diving into lees,</tr_> a game in which the players had to dip their heads into a bowl full of lees so as to get something out, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:122" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.122</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:124" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">124</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
